shortDescription: Elegant 5-bedroom detached family home in Upper Beaches with a wraparound porch and updated interior.
fullDescription: Welcome to 287 Kingston Road in the vibrant Upper Beaches neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. The sleeping quarters comprise 5 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. A private outdoor space — perfect for morning coffee or summer entertaining — completes the package. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
Updated kitchen with quartz counters and soft-close cabinetry
